expectations.text: The response explicitly respects the dry-run instruction and does not create or update a Jira issue.
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states no Jira issue was created or updated and lists only read-only discovery.

expectations.text: The proposed work item targets project OB, is assigned to me, and resolves the active sprint dynamically.
expectations.evidence: Targets OB, assignee me, and dynamically resolves the sole active sprint from the OB Scrum board.

expectations.text: The ticket content is grounded in inspected current changes rather than invented details.
expectations.evidence: Inspects git status and the untracked skill/eval files, then drafts a Task describing those exact changes.

expectations.text: The description is structured Markdown and the workflow avoids passing Markdown through an HTML-default description input.
expectations.evidence: Uses structured Markdown and a create-without-description followed by update --description-format markdown.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions discriminate the core workflow requirements.
